---
title: "Andrew Taeho Kim"
subtitle: "Assistant Professor of Sociology, University of Tennessee, Knoxville"
image: images/atkim_sihyun_2_resize.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:atkim@utk.edu
    - icon: building
      text: UTK Sociology
      href: https://sociology.utk.edu/
    - icon: mortarboard
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=A_HSc4kAAAAJ&hl=en
    # - icon: github
    #   text: GitHub
    #   href: https://github.com/atkim1
    - icon: "{{< aa orcid >}}"
      text: "{{< aa orcid >}} ORCID"
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-1402-2927
---

Andrew Taeho Kim is an Assistant Professor in the Department of Sociology at the University of Tennessee, Knoxville (UTK) (2024–Present). Prior to joining the faculty at UTK, he was a Postdoctoral Fellow at the Population Studies Center at the University of Pennsylvania (2023–2024). He received a Ph.D. from the Department of Sociology at the University of Kansas (2023). Let's see

## Research Interests

- Labor Markets
- Stratification and Inequality
- Race and Ethnicity
- Asian Americans
- Gender
- Marriage and Family
- Returns to Education
- Research Methods and Statistics

## Education

#### University of Kansas
- Ph.D. in Sociology, 2023

#### Korea University
- M.A. in Sociology, 2013

#### Ohio State University
- B.A> in Sociology, 2008
